behavioral_evals.statement: Michael captures 2+ tasks on each weekday via the td CLI or chat bridge

negative_cases.statement: Tasks captured but land with no priority signal
Every new task auto-ranks above existing priorities (recency bias overshoot)

behavioral_evals.statement: When the system proposes related tasks or reframings, Michael acts on the suggestions
behavioral_evals.success_criteria: Score of 0.6 or higher for 2 consecutive weeks

negative_cases.statement: System proposes links between unrelated tasks (over-eager matching creates noise)

behavioral_evals.jtbd: Reflect and reshape in one flow
behavioral_evals.statement: After completing evening recap, Michael completes tomorrow's plan in the same session on mobile
behavioral_evals.success_criteria: Score of 0.8 or higher for 2 consecutive weeks

negative_cases.statement: Recap-to-plan works when attempted but process weight causes skipped days

behavioral_evals.statement: Michael engages with AI priority challenges — reprioritizing tasks or explicitly confirming after devil's advocate pushback
behavioral_evals.success_criteria: Score of 0.3 or higher for 2 consecutive weeks

negative_cases.statement: Priority challenges feel like interruptions, adding ceremony to quick decisions

behavioral_evals.statement: Planning sessions produce relationship-driven backlog churn — merges, deletes, and resurfaced tasks
behavioral_evals.success_criteria: Score of 0.8 or higher for 2 consecutive weeks

negative_cases.statement: System suggests merges/deletes based on weak connections, creating busywork

primary.name: Priority concentration trend
primary.measurement: this_week_p0p1_ratio >= last_week_p0p1_ratio (1 if improved or held, 0 if declined)

primary.name: Recap momentum tone
primary.jtbd_link: Reflect and reshape in one flow
primary.measurement: LLM scores each evening recap 0-1 on forward-momentum language, weekly average

guardrails.statement: System must never add complexity that threatens daily usage
guardrails.fail_condition: Daily usage drops below 4 of 5 weekdays in any given week
